svg.title: SDN topology discovery trust boundary
svg.desc: A conceptual diagram showing how topology discovery can be moved from ordinary controller-controlled forwarding to switch-side isolation and a trusted collector.

text.font-family: Arial, 'PingFang SC', 'Noto Sans CJK SC', sans-serif

svg.text: 把拓扑发现的信任边界前移

text.font-family: Arial, 'PingFang SC', 'Noto Sans CJK SC', sans-serif

svg.text: 普通控制路径、交换机侧隔离与可信发布路径的关系示意

text.font-family: Arial, 'PingFang SC', 'Noto Sans CJK SC', sans-serif
Arial, 'PingFang SC', 'Noto Sans CJK SC', sans-serif

svg.text: 核心判断：拓扑安全不能只看“是否识别攻击”，还要看可信拓扑能否在时限内发布给路由、故障切换与安全应用。
